name: Tomato Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 28 oz (1 large can) undrained and chopped tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatoes (with juice) in a buttered oven-proof baking dish.
2. Add celery, garlic, and red bell pepper; cover and bake at 325°F for 25 minutes.
3. In a large stock pot, sauté mushrooms and onion over medium heat until softened.
4. Gradually add flour and white sugar to the mushroom mixture, stirring continuously
until smooth.
5. Slowly whisk in beef stock, basil, thyme, and bring to a boil.
6. Add the contents of the baked tomato dish; return to a boil.
7. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. In a food processor, blend cream cheese with salt and pepper until smooth.
9. Stir the blended cream cheese into the soup.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
Yield: 12 hearty portions.
